message:
deps(cass): bump franken-agent-detection pin f4f9061f → 88756ba9

Pulls in the commit that adds Copilot CLI Chronicle-format parsing plus a
handful of OpenCode connector fixes. Downstream test (cass#187 regression)
lands in tests/connector_copilot_cli.rs in a subsequent commit; this commit
is the dependency bump in isolation so the version-pin change is easy to
revert if the downstream library needs to be rolled back.

  * Cargo.toml — franken-agent-detection rev updated.
  * README.md — "Pinned Dependencies" table refreshed to match.
  * build.rs — any dep-version-stamped artifact regenerated against the
    new pin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2574,7 +2574,7 @@ Update check state is stored in the data directory:
 | Dependency | Pinned revision |
 |------------|-----------------|
 | `frankensqlite` / `fsqlite-types` | `6d046a5f` |
-| `franken-agent-detection` | `f4f9061f` |
+| `franken-agent-detection` | `88756ba9` |
 | `asupersync` | `2028c111` |
 | `frankensearch` | `ca1f07b4` |
 | `frankentui` | `2d25a03d` |

@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@ const CONTRACTS: &[DependencyContract] = &[
         crate_package_name: "franken-agent-detection",
         manifest_package_field: None,
         expected_git: "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection",
-        expected_rev: "f4f9061fcab3bc0148058a55f0df0ae6e7ba477d",
+        expected_rev: "88756ba9098ae1cbf8014f2456355b56e688df85",
         expected_version: "0.1.3",
         expected_features: &["chatgpt", "connectors", "crush", "cursor", "opencode"],
         expected_default_features: None,
